zh.lifeSummary: 當William II de Clayton於從1112年到1120年出生在英國藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 波斯時，他的父親Robert II de Clayton40歲，母親Lady Margaret Osbaldeston36歲。他和Elizabeth Farrington至少有3個兒子。他去世於1152年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 伍茲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾利藍德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clayton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places, in Yorkshire, Lancashire, Staffordshire, and Sussex, named Clayton, from Old English clǣg ‘clay’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cleeton
meanings: English (Shropshire and Worcestershire): variant of   Clayton  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When William II de Clayton was born from 1112 to 1120, in Clayton le Moors, Lancashire, England, his father, Robert II de Clayton, was 40 and his mother, Lady Margaret Osbaldeston, was 36. He had at least 3 sons with Elizabeth Farrington. He died in 1152, in Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Leyland, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William II de Claytonがから1112年まで1120年にイギリスランカシュアイアクレイトン ル ムールズで生まれた時，父Robert II de Claytonは40歳，母Lady Margaret Osbaldestonは36歳であった。彼はElizabeth Farringtonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1152年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアクレイトン ル ウッドスで死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアリーランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William II de Clayton(이)가 1112년 부터 1120년 까지 영국 랭카실르 클레이턴 일 무르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert II de Clayton(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Osbaldeston(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Farrington(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1152년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 클레이턴 일 우드즈에서 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 리랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William II de Clayton родился с 1112 по 1120 в местности клеитон л мурс, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert II de Clayton было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Osbaldeston, 36. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Elizabeth Farrington. Он умер в 1152 г. в местности клеитон л вудс, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности лиланд, ланкашир, Англия.
